HGSS.405.0002:
Commercial: Always where you need it!
Your local Pokémon Center!
HGSS.405.0003:
Commercial: Full of smiling faces!
Your cheerful Poké Mart!
HGSS.405.0004:
Commercial: Your friend for adventure,
your Pokégear...Pokégear...Pokégear!
Your Pokégear from Silph Co. Take our
latest model on your next adventure!
HGSS.405.0005:
Commercial: Catch that Trainer’s eye for
an intense battle! But don’t pick fights
with those who aren’t Trainers. This has
been a message from the Pokémon League.
HGSS.405.0006:
Commercial: Whenever you turn your head,
there it is. Your constant companion in
life’s journey. Your Pokémon is always
there to help. This has been a message
from the Pokémon League.
HGSS.405.0007:
Commercial: The gentle flow of time, an
ancient figure... The gentle vibrations
of Sprout Tower in Violet City... 
It’s waiting for you. This message
brought to you by the Johto Bureau
of Tourism.
HGSS.405.0008:
Commercial: An ancient message is being
discovered, right now, in the Ruins of
Alph! This message brought to you by the
Johto Bureau of Tourism.
HGSS.405.0009:
Commercial: A beautiful sound and
graceful dance, together at the
Ecruteak Dance Theater.
This message brought to you by the
Johto Bureau of Tourism.
HGSS.405.0010:
Commercial: The light of hope shines over
an anxious boat trip to this port city’s
landmark! Come see the lighthouse!
This message brought to you by the
Johto Bureau of Tourism.
HGSS.405.0011:
Commercial: Gulp gulp! Yum! Aprijuice!
Aprijuice! Run and shake, make Aprijuice!
Gulp gulp! Drink it up! Aprijuice!
Everyone loves Aprijuice! Just for
Pokémon! None for humans! Aprijuice!
HGSS.405.0012:
Commercial: A polished design, a lively
silhouette. A cloud of dust rising up.
Running along with your Pokémon in your
running shoes!
HGSS.405.0013:
Commercial: A fateful encounter that
begins in the Pokémon Center...
A connection between two people...
If you climb the stairs, you’ll find it.
The Union Room.
HGSS.405.0014:
Commercial: A fateful encounter that
begins in the Pokémon Center...
A connection between two people...
If you take the escalator down, you’ll
find it--the Wi-Fi Club.
HGSS.405.0015:
Commercial: The symbol of Goldenrod City,
the Global Terminal! A place where you
can experience the world, where the
world can meet you, and the Global Trade
Station where you can trade Pokémon.
HGSS.405.0016:
Commercial: Come one, come all! Welcome!
Welcome to the Wi-Fi Plaza, where
everyone meets! Play games with others
in the Wi-Fi Plaza! The wa...! Wi-Fi Plaza!
HGSS.405.0017:
Commercial: If it’s Pokémon goods you
want, you can get anything here.
From top to bottom, a wonderful world
of shopping in the Goldenrod
Department Store.
HGSS.405.0018:
Commercial: Between battles, why not
take a break and relax at the Goldenrod
Game Corner?
HGSS.405.0019:
Commercial: Hey, all you radio listeners
out there. This is the Johto Radio
Broadcasting Network. We’re sending out
dreams over our radio waves. La la la,
the Johto Radio Station!
HGSS.405.0020:
Commercial: All right, all right, all right!
Don’t you also want to be certain your
Pokémon is victorious? Let’s go to the
Pokéathlon! There are ten different
events for you to compete in!
HGSS.405.0021:
Commercial: Da da da dum dum dum da da!
Friendship!
Cooperation!
Trust!
Belief in the possibilities!
The dripping sweat is a sign of your
hard work!
...
The Pokéathlon anthem,
“Believe in Pokémon!” On sale soon!
HGSS.405.0022:
Commercial: Are you catching Bug-type
Pokémon? Well Tuesdays, Thursdays,
and Saturdays of every week are
Bug-Catching Contest Days!
Those of you who love Bug-type Pokémon,
gather at the National Park every
Tuesday, Thursday, and Saturday!
See you there!
HGSS.405.0023:
Commercial: Dum da da dum dum da da
dum dum. Pa pa pa pa da dum pa pa pa pa
da dum Pokémon! Catch as many Pokémon
as you like until the Poké Balls run out
at Warden Baoba’s Safari Zone...zone...
HGSS.405.0024:
Commercial: Mahogany Town’s famous Rage
Candy Bar! They work so hard every day
to make these famous RageCandyBars!
Why not take one back home to your
friends--a RageCandyBar!
HGSS.405.0025:
Commercial: Extraordinary Pokémon
battles, the kind you’ve always wished
for, are found only in the Battle Tower.
Take part in the highest-grade battles.
Will you take on the challenge by
yourself or with a partner?
HGSS.405.0026:
Commercial: Do you know the true face of
the Battle Tower? Opening every door on
the planet; every Trainer awaits you!
How far will you be able to go?
HGSS.405.0027:
Commercial: A place where your beloved
Pokémon can become number one.
The battle of a lifetime in the
Battle Hall! 
Make your Pokémon shine bright here;
you’re the only Trainer who can!
HGSS.405.0028:
Commercial: Collect Castle Points!
Manage your Castle Points and use them
before each battle in the Battle Castle!
HGSS.405.0029:
Commercial: Luck is so fickle and selfish
at the Battle Arcade! Just believe in
your Pokémon and go! Fight against fate
in the Battle Arcade! Will the next step
lead you closer to paradise, or
to failure?
HGSS.405.0030:
Commercial: Do you know the best
battle techniques to get Pokémon to
show off their true potential?
The Battle Factory! If you don’t know,
you won’t win! See you at the
Battle Factory!
HGSS.405.0031:
Commercial: We invite you to travel the
lightning-fast trip between Olivine and
Vermilion Cities on a hydroplane-like
boat ride!
HGSS.405.0032:
Commercial: If you’d like to ride your
Bike around as much as you want
under the Kanto sky, why not try
Cycling Road?
It’s waiting for you on Route 17.
HGSS.405.0033:
Commercial: The Pokémon League is
waiting for you, when you’re ready
to challenge us. If you’re coming from
Kanto, we’re right at the end of
Route 22.
This message brought to you by the
Pokémon League.
HGSS.405.0034:
Commercial: The man who restored a town
devastated by a volcanic eruption. That
man was none other than Blaine! He may
have lost his Cinnabar Gym, but he’s been
able to reopen it on Seafoam Islands!
HGSS.405.0035:
Commercial: Hey all you radio listeners
out there. This is the Kanto Radio
Broadcasting Network. We’re sending out
dreams over the radio waves. La la la,
the Kanto Radio Station!
HGSS.405.0036:
Commercial: Silph Co. is a special
high-tech innovation company dedicated
to making people’s lives better and
bringing about a wonderful future.
HGSS.405.0037:
Commercial: From Goldenrod to Saffron
City, a surprising high-speed arrival and
a high-quality journey!
Ride the Magnet Train--the
transportation of the future!
